title: Wedding Pillow Boxes Rose Gold Foil Party Favours (5.15 x 1.35 in 100 Pack)
features: WEDDING PILLOW BOXES: Put jewellery or other small gifts inside of these paper boxes that are made of thicker kraft paper
MAKE IT SPECIAL: Tie a bow with your favourite jute twine or ribbon to make it even more special
PRESCORED: The box is pre-scored so it is easy for you to fold it into the perfect shape for your present
WEDDING FAVOURS: Hand them out at your parties, weddings, or bridal showers
DIMENSIONS: The box measures 5.15 x 1.35 inches when fully assembled
description: The Sparkle and Bash Floral Pillow Boxes provide an elegant and tasteful solution for presenting small gifts with sophistication. These mini floral pillow boxes are perfect for enhancing any occasion, serving seamlessly as wedding favors, bridal shower favors, or baby shower favors. Each box is carefully crafted from durable paper, adorned with a beautiful floral design and accented with gold foil, making them suitable for various themes and events. As the autumn season approaches, these floral pillow boxes are ideal for creating warm and inviting gatherings. They serve as charming thank you pillow boxes, adding a personalized touch to any event. Simply fold along the pre-scored lines for effortless assembly, and adorn with your choice of ribbon or jute twine. Fill them with candies, jewelry, or other small mementos, ensuring they are the perfect fit for your needs. Designed for individuals who appreciate both style and convenience, these pillow boxes are versatile enough for use in multiple events. Whether used as a wedding favor box, a candy pillow box, or a gift for guests at quinceañeras, their elegant floral pattern adds a touch of flair to any occasion. Perfectly suited for those who value aesthetics in their party supplies, these thank you gift boxes are a delightful way to express gratitude. Included in this bulk set are 100 pieces, providing an ample supply for large gatherings or multiple events. Each box measures 5.15 x 1.35 inches when assembled, making them the perfect size for a variety of small items. Designed with durability and ease of use in mind, these boxes ensure your celebrations remain stress-free and stylish. With Sparkle and Bash, your party supplies will not only be practical but also a beautiful reminder of your special day, leaving a lasting impression on all who attend.
